visual_description: An older man with graying hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket over a collared shirt, sits at a table eating a meal with chopsticks. He looks up and speaks to someone off-screen, his expression animated as he talks. Several dishes and a drink cup are on the table in front of him.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese with a casual and slightly impatient tone. The audio is clear and the speech is easily understandable.
